disclosure: This canonical-content reviewed investigation is not proof of a browser-time Codex call.
summary: The repository is an R data package, not a one-command paper pipeline. Its official example visualizes the data, while the package test establishes the 1,846-row, 13-dataset shape contract.
hypothesis: The official example iterates over every named dataset and plots x against y. It does not compute the paper's five-number contract, so an admitted read-only independent verifier is the defensible execution path.
proposedStrategy: Do not patch the public source. Admit the reviewed canonical-content evidence snapshot, then execute the registered read-only summary-matrix verifier without relaxing the reviewed claim.
limitations: No browser-time Codex invocation is claimed.
The verifier is an independent numerical check, not a rerun of the original R package pipeline.
The admitted package/mirror CSV matches only 20 of 65 reviewed paper values; this does not establish that the paper is false.
